title: Green Bean Stir Fry
description: A simple and quick stir fry recipe using green beans and a creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the green beans and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and fermented bean paste.
Add the sauce to the wok or frying pan and stir to combine.
Stir in the cream and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
